title: Instant folder create — no clunky list refresh
description:
Creating folders in PipeShare felt slow: the browser name box, then a full list refresh with a “Refreshing file list…” banner before the folder showed up.

New folder now uses a clean in-app name dialog, paints the folder in the list as soon as the server creates it, and syncs quietly in the background — no refresh banner.

Who is affected: PipeShare file explorer on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: New folder appears immediately after create (no waiting on full list reload).
Remove the “Refreshing file list…” banner during mutations.
In-app New folder name dialog instead of the browser prompt.
Project structure folders paint as each subfolder is created.
